title: Will Base TGE in 2026?
description:
## **Market Dates:**

- **Market Period:** From market publication until December 31, 2026, at 11:59 PM UTC.
- **Market Close:** December 31, 2026, at 11:59 PM UTC.
- **Resolution Time:** By Market Close or earlier if the outcome is determined.

## **Yes/No Criteria:**

- Resolves to **“Yes”** if Base officially launches a token on or before the Market Close.
- The token must be **publicly announced** by Base and **transferable on a blockchain** within the Market Period.
- If the token launch or announcement occurs **outside of the Market Period**, the market will resolve to **“No.”**
- Resolves to **“No”** if no eligible token launch is announced or occurs by the Market Close.

## **Resolution Details:**

- The outcome will be determined based on **public announcements from Base**, including but not limited to:
  - Base’s verified X (formerly Twitter) account
  - Base’s official website or app
  - Other official company communication channels
- Unverified reports, leaks, or third-party speculation will not be considered for resolution.
- The token launched must be branded as Base’s official token or similar to resolve “**Yes.**”
- Stablecoins do not count towards resolution.

## **Cancellation Conditions:**

- The platform ceases operations before the resolution date.
- The resolution source becomes unavailable or compromised.
- Any other circumstance makes it impossible to determine the outcome undisputably.

If the market is canceled, participants can claim their stakes at the then-current market value of their shares, which could result in a profit or a loss depending on the price of those shares at cancellation.

title: Will HYPE flip SOL in 2026?
description:
### **Market Dates:**

- **Market Period:** From the markets publication until December 31, 2026, at 11:59 PM ET.
- **Market Close:** December 31, 2026, at 11:59 PM ET.
- **Resolution Time:** December 31, 2026, at 11:59 PM ET.

### **Resolution Criteria:**

- Resolves to **"Yes"** if, **at any point before or at Resolution Time**, HYPE **surpasses** SOL in market capitalization.
- Resolves to **"No"** otherwise.

Market capitalization values will be compared using CoinGecko\*\*:\*\*

- **HYPE:** [https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/hyperliquid](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/hyperliquid)
- **SOL:** [https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/solana](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/solana)

In case CoinGecko becomes unreliable, unavailable, or stops showing relevant data, CoinMarketCap may be used as a secondary resolution source.

### **Resolution Details:**

- The comparison will be made using the market capitalization as displayed on CoinGecko during the Market Period.

### **Cancellation Conditions:**

- All available resolution sources become unreliable, unavailable or stop showing relevant data.

If cancelled, participants may claim their stakes at the then-current market value of their open positions, which could result in a profit or a loss depending on share prices at cancellation.
